results.rendered_html:
2. vy-ā-√diś P. -diśati, to point out separately, divide among, distribute,  TS.  &c. &c.;
to point out, show, explain, teach,  R. ;  Prab. ;
to prescribe, enjoin,  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
to appoint, assign, despatch to any place or duty, direct, order, command (with dat. loc., or prati),  ib. ;
to declare, foretell,  Mālav. v, 12/13  (v.l. ādiṣṭā for vy-ād˚).

results.rendered_html:
vyādiś 6 P.
1 To order, command; samīraṇo nodayitā bhaveti vyādiśyate kena hutāśanasya  Ku. 3. 21 , 13. 
2 To assign or appoint to (a duty).
3 To divide, distribute.
4 To point, indicate, show.
5 To teach, instruct.
6 To foretell, declare beforehand.
